chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5229 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.21878/2025 3. For hearing of main case 29.01.2026 None present ********* None present for the petitioner. Since filing of instant petition none has shown appearance on behalf of the petitioner giving reasons to believe that the petitioner is not interested to proceed with this petition. Accordingly, the same is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
